message:
feat(mux): add multiplayer pane assignment, adaptive frame rate, and disable server cursor blink

- Multiplayer: admin can assign panels to sessions, coworkers send input
  via control WS with session validation, broadcast assignments/client list
- Disable server-side cursor blink (cursor-style-blink=false) to eliminate
  idle H.264 frames when terminal is not changing
- Adaptive frame rate: skip draw+readpixels when consecutive_unchanged
  exceeds idle threshold, reducing CPU/GPU usage during idle
- Frontend: require WebGPU (remove 2D canvas fallback), defer decoder init
  until renderer ready, add coworker input routing via sendInput()
- Ghostty patch: add ghostty_surface_cursor_info C API for cursor state
- Debug: add /tmp/termweb-panel-debug.log for tracing frame delivery
- Fix tunnel URL wait (signal url_ready on pipe close)
- Forward auth token from page URL to WebSocket connections

files.patch:
@@ -34,6 +34,10 @@ export const BinaryCtrlMsg = {
   SET_QUICK_TERMINAL: 0x8A,  // Set quick terminal open/closed state
   SET_INSPECTOR: 0x8B,  // Set inspector open/closed state
   SET_CLIPBOARD: 0x8C,  // Send clipboard text to server: [panel_id:u32][len:u32][text...]
+  // Multiplayer messages
+  ASSIGN_PANEL: 0x84,     // Admin assigns panel to session: [panel_id:u32][session_id_len:u8][session_id:...]
+  UNASSIGN_PANEL: 0x85,   // Admin unassigns panel: [panel_id:u32]
+  PANEL_INPUT: 0x86,      // Coworker input to assigned panel: [panel_id:u32][input_msg...]
   // Auth messages
   GET_AUTH_STATE: 0x90,
   SET_PASSWORD: 0x91,
